# Long drive line (50,100) -> (250,100). Splice vertices land at every
# auto-graph crossing strictly inside the control segment.

polygon outer
(0,0)
(300,0)
(300,200)
(0,200)
----
polygon outer 4 vertices, ccw, bbox (0,0)-(300,200), area 60000

drive-line
(50,100)
(250,100)
----
drive-line (50,100) -> (250,100)

generate
----
total_stalls: 68
faces: 9 (boundary: 1, interior: 8)
graph: 18 vertices, 25 edges (perimeter: 12, interior: 13)
regions: 1
